author: m1--track-driver-signing-key
content: Plan: (1) Add resolve_driver_fingerprint() to identity.rs reading .crosslink/driver-key.pub, (2) v13 migration in db.rs adding driver_key_fingerprint column to comments, (3) Add field to Comment in models.rs and CommentEntry in issue_file.rs, (4) Update add_intervention_comment in db.rs and shared_writer.rs to accept/store fingerprint, (5) Update intervene.rs to resolve and pass driver fingerprint, (6) Add trust/approvals/<id>.json metadata files in trust.rs recording approver fingerprint, (7) Update get_comments queries to include new column
